raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/26, ordered XXXX XXXX from bestbuy. Stolen from XXXX. Best buy refused to refund, XXXX admitted fault, Bestbuy still refused to refund. Citi sided with merchant despite a lot of evidence. 
I contacted with best buy communicated with XXXX communicated with best buy again best buy refused to do anything did a chargeback citi sided with best buy reopened the dispute again, with overwhelming evidence citi sided with best buy again.
